occurrence_sentence: Seeq introduced the Seeq AI Assistant, a generative AI (GenAI) resource embedded across its industrial analytics platform.
Seeq introduced the Seeq AI Assistant, a generative AI (GenAI) resource embedded across its industrial analytics platform.
Seeq, a leader in industrial analytics and AI, unveiled the Seeq AI Assistant, a generative AI (GenAI) resource embedded across its industrial analytics platform.
Seeq, a leader in industrial analytics and AI, unveiled the Seeq AI Assistant, a generative AI (GenAI) resource embedded across its industrial analytics platform.
In a recent study by Deloitte, 93% of industrial companies believe AI will be a game changer for driving growth and innovation in the industrial sector.
The Seeq AI Assistant provides organizations with the opportunity to further debottleneck their most precious resource – the people at the frontlines of their processes and decisions.
The Seeq AI Assistant provides organizations with the opportunity to further debottleneck their most precious resource – the people at the frontlines of their processes and decisions.

"With the Seeq AI Assistant, we expect to decrease our process experts' learning curve for advanced analytics and machine learning by 50% or possibly more," said Brian Scallan, Director of Continuous Improvement at Ascend Performance Materials.

interaction_phrase: decrease our process experts' learning curve for advanced analytics and machine learning by 50% or possibly more
occurrence_sentence: "With the Seeq AI Assistant, we expect to decrease our process experts' learning curve for advanced analytics and machine learning by 50% or possibly more," said Brian Scallan, Director of Continuous Improvement at Ascend Performance Materials.

Combining these competencies with prompt engineering curated by the world-class analytics and learning engineers at Seeq, the Seeq AI assistant generates accurate and actionable suggestions for analytical approaches and techniques, code generation and more.

"Integrating the Seeq AI Assistant across the Seeq platform enables team members across industrial organizations to harness the power of GenAI to drive favorable operational excellence, profitability, workforce upskilling, and sustainability outcomes and stay ahead in an increasingly competitive landscape."

interaction_phrase: GenAI capabilities are a powerful inclusion in analytics software as a way to democratize AI and machine learning
occurrence_sentence: "GenAI capabilities are a powerful inclusion in analytics software as a way to democratize AI and machine learning," said Jonathan Lang, Research Director for IDC Industry Operations.

interaction_phrase: Integrating the Seeq AI Assistant across the Seeq platform
occurrence_sentence: Integrating the Seeq AI Assistant across the Seeq platform enables team members across industrial organizations to harness the power of GenAI to drive favorable operational excellence, profitability, workforce upskilling, and sustainability outcomes and stay ahead in an increasingly competitive landscape.

interaction_phrase: Seeq has included features to alleviate one of the top concerns companies have about trust by including explainability to ensure the GenAI 'shows its work'
occurrence_sentence: "GenAI capabilities are a powerful inclusion in analytics software as a way to democratize AI and machine learning," said Jonathan Lang, Research Director for IDC Industry Operations. "Based on conversations with industrial enterprises, GenAI offers a more natural interface to lower the barriers to data analytics, and Seeq has included features to alleviate one of the top concerns companies have about trust by including explainability to ensure the GenAI 'shows its work.'"
